utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan contains all five of these items explicitly. Each includes the required details: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs; travel_coverage specifies travel insurance with costs; additional_services includes enhancement services with costs; total_budget provides a complete monthly and annual breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan includes four major components: health_coverage (physical_health and mental_health), property_coverage (home_and_contents), travel_coverage (global_travel_plan), and additional_services (concierge_service). To map these to ratings, we look for the closest matching options in the ground-truth dataset. For physical_health, the description 'Executive international coverage with premium medical network, specialist access, telemedicine, and wellness programs' fits the top-tier premium plans (EliteCare Premium Plan or PrimeCare Premium Plan), both rated 10. For mental_health, the plan includes therapy, psychiatry, stress management, and family counseling — matching PrimeCare Premium Plan or EliteCare Premium Plan, both rated 10. For property_coverage (home_and_contents), the plan includes 'Comprehensive coverage for apartment/house including electronics up to €3,000,' which matches InsurePlus Standard Coverage with a rating of 7. For travel_coverage (global_travel_plan) including 'international travel 365 days/year with medical emergency and evacuation support,' this aligns best with top-tier options like PrimeTravel Premium Plan or EliteTravel Premium Plan, rated 10. For additional_services (concierge_service), the plan includes '24/7 concierge and executive assistance plus gym membership reimbursement' — the closest ground-truth items are 24/7 Travel Assistance (rating 10) and Gym Membership Reimbursement (rating 6). The AI likely combined these, so we include both ratings.
